title: poa nemoralis subsp. vulgaris
intro: Poa nemoralis subsp. vulgaris, also known as common meadow-grass or rough meadow-grass, is a subspecies of grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis subsp. vulgaris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
